case_title: GALATHE, ALFREDA vs. HEART OF THE CITY FARMERS MARKET et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HEART OF THE CITY FARMERS MARKET
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT HEART OF THE CITY FARMERS MARKET AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THAMMAVONG, KONG PHON ROES 1 TO 20

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-21-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE AS TO WHY THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR KONG PHON THAMMAVONG AND ON THE CROSS DEFT. (SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED IF PARTIES DO NOT COMPLY WITH COURT RULES) DEFT. MR. THAMMAVONG WAS PRESENT IN COURT AND GIVEN ORAL NOTICE OF THE NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALATHE, ALFREDA
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HEART OF THE CITY FARMERS MARKET

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND OSC - $100.00 EACH AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND CROSS COMPLAINANT: SET PER CCP 575.2, AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM JUN-20-1996 TO JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE ALL PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR IWN COSTS & ATTORNEY'S FEES

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALATHE, ALFREDA AS TO DEFENDANT HEART OF THE CITY FARMERS MARKET THAMMAVONG, KONG PHON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-21-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-01-1996
